name: aigenius-desktop-server
description: Minimal local HTTP server for the AIGenius desktop app (Hono, not full NestJS)

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src=p.join('python');const dst=p.join('dist','python');fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true,filter:(s)=>!String(s).includes('__pycache__')});fs.mkdirSync(p.join('dist','search'),{recursive:true});for(const f of['schema.sql','schema-chunks.sql','schema-import-graph.sql','schema-intelligence.sql']){fs.copyFileSync(p.join('src','search',f),p.join('dist','search',f));}" && node scripts/verify-dist-layout.cjs
